body:
If you need **same-day garage door repair near Pleasanton** , these companies are currently operating in the area and advertise fast or same-day service:

  * The Door Doctor (Pleasanton) — Open 24/7, highly reviewed, handles broken springs, openers, cables, and emergency repairs.

  * Precision Garage Door Service (Pleasanton) — Open daily from 5:00 AM–11:00 PM and states that same-day service is available for most repairs. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Valiant Garage Door (Pleasanton) — Open 24/7 and says same-day appointments are available depending on technician routing and parts availability. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC (Dublin) — Open 24/7 and just a few minutes from Pleasanton.

  * Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation (Dublin) — Open 24/7 with emergency service.

When you call, it's helpful to have this information ready:

  * The problem (door won't open, broken spring, snapped cable, opener issue, off-track door, etc.)

  * Whether the door is stuck open or closed

  * Your address in or near Pleasanton

  * Your preferred arrival window today

If you suspect a **broken torsion spring** (often accompanied by a loud bang and a very heavy door), avoid trying to lift the door manually, as the spring carries much of the door's weight. [How Much Does It Actually Cost to Replace a Garage Door Spring?](https://www.thespruce.com/garage-door-spring-replacement-8635322?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you'd like, tell me what's wrong with the garage door (for example, "won't open," "spring broke," or "opener clicks but nothing moves"), and I can help you estimate the likely repair and cost before you book.
